prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: Godot story dialogue character bust portrait
Primary request: 404 outpost surface explorer protagonist, age 20-30, tired from long underground life, alert but restrained expression, worn protective jacket, lightweight backpack straps visible, simple chest breathing filter or old protective scarf, dusty clothes with repairs and abrasion, a few small blue-purple electronic modules, dark gray hand-drawn manga line art, gritty wasteland texture.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: one standalone half-body bust character, waist-up priority, front or three-quarter front view, complete head and shoulders visible, no cropped face, no cropped shoulders.
Style/medium: dark hand-drawn manga concept art, rough ink lines, grayscale wasteland palette with tiny blue-purple accents, Godot UI portrait cutout.
Composition/framing: centered character with generous transparent-cutout padding, portrait-friendly 1024x1536 composition, no dialogue box, no UI frame.
Lighting/mood: subdued underground survivor mood, soft gray ambient light, restrained contrast.
Color palette: charcoal, dirty gray, worn fabric beige, tiny blue-purple electronics only.
Constraints: background must be one uniform #00ff00 color with no shadows, gradients, texture, floor plane, reflection, or lighting variation; do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the character; no cast shadow; no text; no watermark; no logo; no weapon focus.
Avoid: bright cyberpunk neon, clean new military uniform, exaggerated anime expression, modern school clothing, modern city fashion, top-down sprite style, chibi proportions.
style: dark gray hand-drawn manga wasteland character concept art
composition: single centered waist-up bust portrait for dialogue UI, full head and shoulders visible
lighting: subdued gray ambient light, restrained highlights
constraints: flat #00ff00 chroma-key background only; no text; no watermark; clean cutout edge; final use requires local chroma removal

prompt:

Primary request: 404 outpost administrator and dispatcher, long responsible for underground outpost communications and material logistics, controlled reliable expression with visible fatigue, worn old uniform or repair vest, shoulder area may have a small 404 mark, headset or communication device, old terminal accessories, subtle warm yellow work-lamp reflection, dark gray hand-drawn manga line art, gritty wasteland texture.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: one standalone half-body bust character, waist-up priority, front or three-quarter front view, complete head and shoulders visible, no cropped face, no cropped shoulders.
Style/medium: dark hand-drawn manga concept art, rough ink lines, grayscale wasteland palette with restrained warm-yellow accents, Godot UI portrait cutout.
Composition/framing: centered character with generous transparent-cutout padding, portrait-friendly 1024x1536 composition, no dialogue box, no UI frame.

Avoid: bright cyberpunk neon, clean new military uniform, exaggerated anime expression, modern office clothing, modern school clothing, top-down sprite style, chibi proportions.
